Class DownloadTask

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.SwingWorker<Void,String>
mosqueira.pureStream.ControladorInterno.DownloadTask
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable, Future<Void>, RunnableFuture<Void>
public class DownloadTask extends SwingWorker<Void,String>
SwingWorker that executes yt-dlp in the background and streams its output to a log area.

The worker builds the command using CommandBuilder, starts the process, parses progress updates, tries to detect the final output file, and notifies the UI when finished.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Romina

  • Constructor Details

    • DownloadTask

      public DownloadTask(String url, PreferencesPanel preferencesPanel, JTextArea logArea, JComboBox<String> format, JComboBox<String> quality, MainPanel parentPanel)
      Creates a background download task executed with SwingWorker.

      The task launches yt-dlp using the current user preferences and updates the provided log area with progress/output. When the download finishes, it detects the final file and notifies the MainPanel.

      Parameters:
      url - video/audio URL to download
      preferencesPanel - user preferences (yt-dlp path, M3U, speed limit, etc.)
      logArea - text area where process output and status messages are appended
      format - combo box that contains the selected output format (e.g. mp3/mp4)
      quality - combo box that contains the selected quality (e.g. 360p/720p)
      parentPanel - main panel that receives completion notifications

  • Method Details

    • doInBackground

      protected Void doInBackground() throws Exception
      Runs yt-dlp on a background thread, publishing output lines to process(java.util.List).
      Specified by:
      doInBackground in class SwingWorker<Void,String>
      Returns:
      null when finished
      Throws:
      Exception - if process execution fails

    • process

      protected void process(List<String> chunks)
      Receives lines published from the background thread and updates the UI log and progress.
      Overrides:
      process in class SwingWorker<Void,String>
      Parameters:
      chunks - output lines produced by yt-dlp

    • done

      protected void done()
      Called on the EDT when the background work finishes.

      Detects the final file, verifies it exists (or finds a close match), and notifies the UI of the downloaded MediaFile.

      Overrides:
      done in class SwingWorker<Void,String>
